creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 153216
patch to set make environment on do-built target

The target calls the c compiler somewhere along the way, but the failure to set the make environment causes this port to fail on a specific configuration involving the alternate compiler (gcc-5).

I normally commit this directly under fix-it-blanket, but I'm opening a PR instead out of courtesy.  I'm ready to commit upon approval.
